creator: mkm@marvin.idsi.net
text:
the scorefile installed is invalid:

mkm@marvin> dopewars

** CRITICAL **: /usr/X11R6/share/dopewars/dopewars.sco does not appear to be a valid
high score file - please check it. If it is a high score file
from an older version of dopewars, then first convert it to the
new format by running "dopewars -C /usr/X11R6/share/dopewars/dopewars.sco"
from the command line.

mkm@marvin> ls -l /usr/X11R6/share/dopewars/dopewars.sco
-rw-rw-r--  1 root  wheel  0 Dec  1 12:26 /usr/X11R6/share/dopewars/dopewars.sco

How-To-Repeat: install the dopewars port and try to run it
